title: crotalaria aspalathoides
intro: Crotalaria aspalathoides, also known as Cape stacker or mountain stacker, is a flowering plant species in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Crotalaria aspalathoides can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
